name: Geometry Dash Cube Adventure
description: Geometry Dash Jump is a fast-paced arcade platform game where your reflexes are the key to survival. Control the cube and jump over dangerous spikes, traps, and obstacles while moving through exciting levels. Time your jumps perfectly and try to reach the finish without crashing. The game becomes more challenging as you progress, testing your skills and reaction speed. Can you complete all the levels and master the dash?
instructions: Click Tap Green Flag ndash Start game Click Tap Spacebar ndash Jump Pause button top-left ndash Pause or resume Home button top-left ndash Save progress and go to home screen
